hooks.command: mkdir -p "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}" && (diff -q "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/package-lock.json" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/package-lock.json" >/dev/null 2>&1 && diff -q "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/package.json" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/package.json" >/dev/null 2>&1 || (cd "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}" && cp "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/package.json" . && cp "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/package-lock.json" . && npm ci --omit=dev)) || rm -f "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/package.json" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/package-lock.json"
